title: Opium Cobblemon
description: Modpack composed a few qol mods for the Cobblemon experience
body:
This modpack expands the world of Cobblemon by combining Pokémon-style gameplay with exploration, building, and multiplayer-friendly features. It focuses on creating a balanced experience where players can catch and train Pokémon while also enjoying the depth of Minecraft’s modded ecosystem.

**What this modpack adds**

A full Cobblemon experience with Pokémon spawning naturally across the world

Quality-of-life mods that make inventory management, travel, and gameplay smoother

Performance improvements to keep the game running well even with many mods

Multiplayer-friendly features for servers and cooperative play

**Key Features**

Catch, train, and battle Pokémon directly in the Minecraft world

Explore diverse environments where different Pokémon spawn

Enhanced exploration with new structures to discover throughout the world

Useful Battle UI improvements

Optimized performance for stable gameplay

**Why download this modpack?**

If you enjoy Pokémon-style gameplay but want a deeper sandbox experience, this modpack combines the best of both worlds. You can build bases, explore massive landscapes, collect and train Pokémon, and play with friends while enjoying a smooth and polished modded Minecraft experience.

Whether you're a casual explorer, competitive trainer, or builder, this pack offers a fun and balanced Cobblemon adventure.

Recommended 8-10GB of ram to run
This Description was made with ChatGPT due to the fact that i failed english and have no clue on how to make a proper description myself.
